name: gerber
description: Cross-project orchestration helpers for Codex: Gerber RAG, Airtable message bus workflows, Linear handoffs, and project onboarding.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-project memory, inbox, handoffs, and onboarding for Codex
interface.longDescription: Gerber gives Codex project-aware workflows for querying the Gerber RAG vault, reading and sending bus messages through Airtable, managing Linear handoffs, provisioning the message bus, and onboarding projects.
defaultPrompt: Search the Gerber vault for this project.
Create a handoff for this session.
